title: Oris
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Oris''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] with a 2,950-kilometer diameter from outside of the [[Goroth system/Legends|Goroth system]] composed of [[nickel]] and [[Iron/Legends|iron]]. It was captured in the closest orbit of [[Goroth Alpha]]. It had a local day of 31 standard hours at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], but was observed to be growing shorter. The planetoid's name was [[Gorothite/Legends|Gorothite]] for "birth of dawn."

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-01-XX -->''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''
